summary: Fixed all 5 static audit findings: cross-store audit log isolation (F1), true stored-value at-rest encryption with VARCHAR columns (F2), frontend audit trail UI (F3), missing run_app.sh (F4), and login credential disclosure removal (F5).

details: Added store_id column to audit_log table via migration 20260404_0013.
Updated audit_event() to accept and persist store_id on all audit writes.
Propagated store_id through all 28 audit_event() calls across 8 service files (loyalty, inventory, order, campaign, training, attendance, kpi, analytics).
Rewrote /audit/* endpoints to enforce server-side store-scope filtering: store_manager users only see events for their own store or unscoped events.
Added cross-store audit isolation test: manager102 cannot see store 101 events.
Converted wallet_accounts.balance, wallet_ledger.amount, wallet_ledger.balance_after, and points_ledger.pre_tax_amount from Numeric to VARCHAR(255) via migration 20260404_0014.
All wallet writes now go through _encrypt_amount() producing Fernet ciphertext when FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY is configured.
All wallet reads transparently decrypt via _decrypt_stored_amount().
Updated seed_service.py to use string values for wallet/points columns.
Added wallet encryption roundtrip test and end-to-end wallet credit/debit persistence tests.
Added audit.ts API service client with typed methods for all audit endpoints.
Added AuditTrailView.vue with category filter (all/member/campaign/order), action search, and data table.
Added /app/audit route with administrator + store_manager role guard.
Created run_app.sh startup helper script matching README reference.
Runs docker compose up --build -d and prints service URLs.
Removed default password hint text from LoginView.vue.
Removed prefilled username/password defaults from form state.

validation.backend_tests: docker compose --profile test run --rm backend-tests => 84 passed
validation.frontend_tests: docker compose --profile test run --rm frontend-tests => 16 passed (6 test files)
